title: Conservatives should not just focus on voters lost to Reform, analysis suggests
description: Polling finds that Tory voters who have drifted left or become disengaged outnumber those turning to Nigel Farage’s party
content: Polling finds that Tory voters who have drifted left or become disengaged outnumber those turning to Nigel Farage’s party
